headline: Dow Jones Futures: Leading Stocks Stand Tall As Market Bounces; Look For This Bullish Signal
summary: Futures fell as the March jobs report was much stronger than expected. Look for this stock market signal. Tesla tumbled Thursday.

headline: Teradyne (TER) Valuation Check As AI Test Momentum And Earnings Beats Sustain Investor Optimism
summary: SEMICON China spotlight puts Teradyne’s AI test push in focus Teradyne (TER) is back in the spotlight after its SEMICON China 2026 showcase, where it highlighted new AI focused semiconductor test platforms and reinforced its role in advanced chip and electronics testing. See our latest analysis for Teradyne. Teradyne’s share price has moved to US$309.61, with a 4.7% 7 day share price return and a 49.2% 90 day share price return.
